flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Everett Community College fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (6.5k → 4.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Everett Community College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.1k → $5.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Everett Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.4k vs 5.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Everett Community College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.6k → $11.2k).
